zh.hero_badge: 專業喜慶帛事花藝服務
zh.hero_desc: 福建花店專營各類喜慶花牌、帛事花牌、中西花圈、開張花牌、社團花牌、畢業花牌及寵物花牌。三十年經驗，信譽保證，需提前5天前預訂。
zh.section_ceremonial_title: 喜慶花牌 · 紅事花牌
zh.section_ceremonial_desc: 婚嫁喜慶、壽辰祝賀、滿月之喜，以鮮豔奪目的花牌傳達最誠摯的祝福。需提前5天前預訂。
zh.section_wreaths_title: 中西花圈 · 圓型花牌
zh.section_wreaths_desc: 傳統中式花圈配以輓聯，或西式圓型花環，各具特色，表達不同文化背景的悼念情懷。需提前5天前預訂。
zh.section_opening_title: 開張花牌 · 開業誌慶
zh.section_opening_desc: 生意興隆、財源廣進！各式高貴開張花牌，配以紅掌、百合、向日葵，為新店開業增添喜慶氣氛。需提前5天前預訂。
zh.section_association_title: 社團花牌 · 同鄉會館
zh.section_association_desc: 同鄉會、商會、宗親會、體育會等各類社團慶典花牌。大氣磅礴，彰顯團體氣派。需提前5天前預訂。
zh.section_graduation_title: 畢業花牌 · 學業誌慶
zh.section_graduation_desc: 畢業典禮、學校開放日、學術成就慶祝。以鮮花表達對學子的祝福與鼓勵。需提前5天前預訂。
zh.section_pets_title: 寵物花牌 · 寵物悼念
zh.section_pets_desc: 為摯愛的毛孩送上最後的祝福。寵物花牌、寵物花圈，以溫柔的花藝紀念與我們相伴的寶貝。需提前5天前預訂。
zh.funeral_title: 帛事花牌 · 白事花圈
zh.funeral_desc: 在失去摯愛的時刻，以莊重肅穆的花藝表達最深切的哀悼。我們提供各式帛事花牌、西式花圈、中式輓聯花牌，免費代寫輓聯。急單需$800起，需提前5天前預訂。
zh.funeral_service_1_desc: 所有花牌需提前5天前預訂，以確保品質及準備時間。急單需$800起。
zh.funeral_service_2_desc: 專業書法代寫輓聯、悼詞，以傳統中式格式表達對先人的敬意與懷念。
zh.funeral_service_3_desc: 傳統白事花卉，白百合象徵靈魂純潔，白菊表達哀思，以虔誠敬意編排。
zh.funeral_contact_title: 在這艱難時刻需要協助嗎？
zh.funeral_contact_desc: 我們富有同理心的團隊隨時為您協助選擇適當的花藝作品。提供謹慎諮詢，可直接與殯儀館協調安排。急單需$800起。
zh.delivery_desc: 我們提供靈活的送貨選擇，滿足您的不同需求。
zh.delivery_kln_desc: 紅磡、尖沙咀、旺角、觀塘等九龍各區
zh.delivery_nt_desc: 中環、銅鑼灣、沙田、荃灣等新界及港島各區
zh.delivery_pickup_desc: 九龍紅磡曲街2N號興利大廈地下西鋪
zh.urgent_desc: 所有花牌需提前5天前預訂。如需急單服務，訂單金額需$800或以上。請直接致電或WhatsApp查詢急單安排。
zh.about_title:
福建花店
喜事白事 · 一站俱全
zh.about_desc_1: 福建花店創立於九十年代，專營各類喜慶花牌、帛事花牌、開張花牌、社團花牌、畢業花牌及寵物花牌。我們深明紅白二事對華人社會的重要性，每一件花藝作品都承載著深厚的文化意義與情感。
zh.about_desc_2: 我們提供免費代寫輓聯、賀詞服務，並與各大殯儀館、會館保持緊密合作。所有花牌需提前5天前預訂，確保品質。三十年來，我們以誠信、專業、細心服務無數家庭與社團。
zh.footer_desc: 專營喜慶花牌、帛事花牌、開張花牌、社團花牌、畢業花牌及寵物花牌。三十年老字號，信譽保證。
zh.footer_hours: 每日營業：上午9時至晚上7時
zh.cart_preorder: 需提前5天前預訂。急單需$800起。

en.hero_desc: Fujian Florist specializes in ceremonial plaques, funeral plaques, Chinese/Western wreaths, grand opening plaques, association plaques, graduation plaques and pet memorial plaques. 30 years of experience. 5 days pre-order required.
en.section_ceremonial_desc: Weddings, birthdays, full moon celebrations. 5 days pre-order required.
en.section_wreaths_desc: Traditional Chinese wreaths with eulogy ribbons, or Western circular wreaths. 5 days pre-order required.
en.section_opening_desc: Prosperity and abundance! Elegant opening plaques for new business ventures. 5 days pre-order required.
en.section_association_desc: Hometown associations, chambers of commerce, clan associations. 5 days pre-order required.
en.section_graduation_desc: Graduation ceremonies, school events, academic achievements. 5 days pre-order required.
en.section_pets_desc: Honoring your beloved furry friends. Pet memorial plaques and wreaths. 5 days pre-order required.
en.funeral_desc: Express your deepest condolences with dignified floral arrangements. Free calligraphy service. Urgent orders $800+. 5 days pre-order required.
en.funeral_service_1_desc: All plaques require 5 days pre-order to ensure quality. Urgent orders $800+.
en.funeral_service_2_desc: Professional calligraphy for eulogy ribbons and memorial messages.
en.funeral_service_3_desc: Traditional funeral flowers arranged with reverence.
en.funeral_contact_desc: Our compassionate team is available to help. Urgent orders $800+.
en.delivery_desc: Flexible delivery options to meet your needs.
en.delivery_kln_desc: Hung Hom, TST, Mong Kok, Kwun Tong
en.delivery_nt_desc: Central, Causeway Bay, Sha Tin, Tsuen Wan
en.delivery_pickup_desc: West shop, Hing Lee Building, 2N Cooke Street, Hung Hom, Kowloon
en.urgent_desc: All plaques require 5 days pre-order. For urgent orders, minimum order $800+. Please call or WhatsApp for urgent arrangements.
en.about_title:
Fujian Florist
Red & White Affairs · All in One
en.about_desc_1: Established in the 1990s, specializing in ceremonial, funeral, opening, association, graduation and pet memorial plaques. We understand the cultural significance of red and white affairs.
en.about_desc_2: We offer free eulogy writing and work closely with funeral homes. All plaques require 5 days pre-order. 30 years of trusted service.
en.footer_desc: Specializing in ceremonial, funeral, opening, association, graduation and pet memorial plaques. 30 years of trusted service.
